query:
ALTER TABLE nas 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mikrotikApiPort INT DEFAULT 8728,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mikrotikApiUser VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mikrotikApiPassword VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS location VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status ENUM('active', 'inactive') DEFAULT 'active',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastSeen TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
